problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
